fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: From Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the first item entry number in the register.

fields.name: To Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last sequence number from the range of service ledger entries created for this register line.

fields.name: From Warranty Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the first sequence number from the range of warranty ledger entries created for this register line.

fields.name: To Warranty Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last sequence number from the range of warranty ledger entries created for this register line.

fields.name: Creation Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the entries in the register were created.

fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who posted the entry, to be used, for example, in the change log.
